dc:title: Collabra: Psychology - Complete Open-Access Corpus (2017-2026)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: psychology
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A complete corpus of 749 open-access articles published in Collabra: Psychology from 2017 to June 2026, converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. Each paper is represented as a structured R object containing full text, references, figures, tables, and bibliographic metadata extracted via GROBID 0.9.
